---
title: "egg_calc"
output: html_document
---

## Libraries
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(ggplot2)
library(naniar)
library(ggmap)
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(bslib)
```

```{r}
egg_laying <- read_csv("data/egg_laying_data.csv") %>% 
  clean_names()
plant_chemistry <- read_csv("data/plant_chemistry_data.csv") %>%
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
plant_joined <- left_join(egg_laying, plant_chemistry %>% select(plant_id, n, c, cn_percent, n_molar, c_molar, cn_molar, quality_pc1, quality_pc2), by="plant_id")
```

```{r}

ui <- page_sidebar(
  title = "Egg Calculator Regression",
  sidebar = sidebar(
    
    # Select predictor variables
    checkboxGroupInput(
      "predictor_vars",
      "Select Predictor Variables:",
      choices = c("predicted_n",
                  "bare_ground",
                  "veg",
                  "sward_height",
                  "plant_area",
                  "average_leaf_size",
                  "temperature_ambient",
                  "temperature_soil"
      ),
      selected = c("predicted_n")
    ),
    
    # Action button to run regression
    actionButton("run_regression", "Run Regression", class = "btn-primary mt-3")
  ),
  
  # Main panel with plots and results
  navset_card_tab(
    nav_panel(
      "Scatter Plots",
      card(
        card_header("Egg Count vs Predictor Variables"),
        plotOutput("scatter_plots", height = "600px")
      )
    ),
    nav_panel(
      "Regression Summary",
      card(
        card_header("Model Summary"),
        verbatimTextOutput("regression_summary")
      ),
      card(
        card_header("Model Coefficients"),
        tableOutput("coefficients_table")
      )
    ),
    nav_panel(
      "Diagnostic Plots",
      card(
        card_header("Residual Diagnostics"),
        plotOutput("diagnostic_plots", height = "600px")
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Fit regression model when button is clicked
  model <- eventReactive(input$run_regression, {
    req(input$predictor_vars)
    
    # Create formula with egg count as dependent variable
    formula_str <- paste("n_eggs ~", paste(input$predictor_vars, collapse = " + "))
    formula_obj <- as.formula(formula_str)
    
    # Fit linear model
    lm(formula_obj, data = plant_joined)
  })
  
  # Scatter plots
  output$scatter_plots <- renderPlot({
    req(input$predictor_vars)
    
    n_predictors <- length(input$predictor_vars)
    
    # Calculate grid dimensions
    n_cols <- ceiling(sqrt(n_predictors))
    n_rows <- ceiling(n_predictors / n_cols)
    
    par(mfrow = c(n_rows, n_cols), mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))
    
    for (predictor in input$predictor_vars) {
      plot(plant_joined[[predictor]], plant_joined$n_eggs,
           xlab = predictor,
           ylab = "Egg Count",
           main = paste("Egg Count vs", predictor),
           pch = 19,
           col = rgb(0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.6),
           cex = 1.2)
      
      # Add regression line for visualization
      abline(lm(plant_joined$n_eggs ~ plant_joined[[predictor]]), 
             col = "red", lwd = 2)
    }
  })
  
  # Regression summary
  output$regression_summary <- renderPrint({
    req(model())
    summary(model())
  })
  
  # Coefficients table
  output$coefficients_table <- renderTable({
    req(model())
    
    coef_summary <- summary(model())$coefficients
    coef_df <- as.data.frame(coef_summary)
    coef_df$Variable <- rownames(coef_df)
    coef_df <- coef_df[, c("Variable", "Estimate", "Std. Error", "t value", "Pr(>|t|)")]
    rownames(coef_df) <- NULL
    
    coef_df
  }, digits = 4)
  
  # Diagnostic plots
  output$diagnostic_plots <- renderPlot({
    req(model())
    
    par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
    plot(model())
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
